summary: Audience tape with noticeable echo captures an emotionally charged performance despite technical imperfections.
review: The recording is an audience source that suffers from some echo, giving it a lo-fi character, but listeners appreciate the emotional intensity of the band on this night. Reviewers feel the show was special and moving, outweighing the modest sound quality issues.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) praises the emotional performance while noting tape echo; rating reflects strong show impression but limited technical clarity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape with noticeable echo and occasional muffled moments, but overall listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review mentions the show felt very emotional for both band and Deadheads; no specific commentary on pacing or song order.
